description: baseline (defaults, epochs=30)
std_coeff=10.0 (more collapse, not less)
lr=1e-4 (collapse unchanged, slower learning)
min_context_fraction=0.30 (identical to baseline)
2x mask scales (~63% masked, embed_std up slightly)
predictor_depth=1 (much worse collapse, embed_std=0.06)
encoder_depth=2 (BEST: embed_std=0.80, probes improved)
depth=2 + 2x masks (on par with depth=2 alone)
depth=2 + ema=0.999 (no improvement over depth=2)
depth=2 + lr=1e-3 (NEW BEST: cosim=0.92, embed_std=4.6)
depth=2 + lr=3e-3 (too aggressive, probes degraded)
depth=2 + lr=1e-3 x100ep (diverged after ep30)
depth=2 + lr=1e-3 + cosine schedule x100ep (diverged same as exp12)
depth=2 + lr=3e-4 + cosine schedule x100ep (re-collapsed mid-run ep49)
depth=2 + lr=5e-4 + cosine schedule x100ep (still collapsed, lr middle ground didn't help)
depth=2 + lr=5e-4 + constant ema=0.998 x100ep (same collapse, EMA schedule not the cause)
depth=2 + lr=5e-4 + NO VCLoss x100ep (val_reg=0.676 but test_reg=1.01! overfitting)
depth=2 + lr=5e-4 + NO VCLoss + Huber x100ep (same overfitting: val=0.676, test=1.01)
depth=2 + lr=1e-3 + NO VCLoss + Huber x100ep (same overfitting pattern)
LeWM: no EMA + SIGReg + Huber x100ep (cosim≈0 but test_reg=1.01)
EMA + SIGReg(0.1) + Huber x100ep (*val_reg noisy mean~0.84; identical to exp21)
EMA + weak SIGReg(0.01) + Huber x100ep (probe_acc recovered, same val/test gap)
VCLoss(0.5,0.5) + Huber x100ep (BEST probe_acc=0.61! stable + best test_reg)
